input.background: The number of asthmatics in the asthma survey discussed in the prior illustration varies according to a binomial distribution with n=20 and p=0.04.
input.question: What is the cumulative probability of observing two asthmatics in a sample? We established in the prior illustration box that Pr(X=0)=0.4420, Pr(X=1)=0.3683, and Pr(X=2)=0.1458.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

n.description: The number of trials in the binomial distribution.

p.description: The probability of success on each trial in the binomial distribution.

Pr(X=0).description: The probability of observing zero asthmatics in the sample.

Pr(X=1).description: The probability of observing one asthmatic in the sample.

Pr(X=2).description: The probability of observing two asthmatics in the sample.
